title: myosotis palustris subsp. repens
intro: Myosotis palustris subsp. repens, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Myosotis palustris subsp. repens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic and to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
